violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as pickles) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were moved to different storage location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

Various food items in the pizza prep unit were observed held at temperatures ranging from 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were loaded into unit less than 2 hours prior to inspection and were moved to freezer to rapidly cool. PIC adjusted temperature of prep unit and ambient was observed at 40 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
